prompt.content: I'd like to understand the temporal impact of rate hikes on loan losses of both variable and fixed type loans. Inspect the chart "Impact of Rate Hikes: Variable Rate Loan Losses" from the file "1.11.2026 Habor Capital Final.pdf" and consider the point when variable rate loan losses spiked from a baseline of ~750M to ~1.2B. At the time of this spike (use the first day on the month of the change), what were the last 2 changes in the Federal Reserve's Federal Funds Target Rate, by how much did the rate change each time, how many months ago did they occur (round to nearest with 30d/month), and what were the target rates? The SQL table fred_database contains data on the Fed's target rates. Use the series DFEDTARL (target rate lower bound) as a proxy for the Fed's target rate. Round to 2 decimals. Return SQLite code for this analysis along with results.

rubrics.name: Reports that first most recent change to the Federal Funds Target Rate was an... (ver_14fbe48f821c4c2d97967d6d6ef4d471)

messages.content: Reports that first most recent change to the Federal Funds Target Rate was an increase of 0.25% +/-0.02.

messages.content: Reports that second most recent change to the Federal Funds Target Rate was an increase of 0.25% +/-0.02.

rubrics.name: Reports that the Federal Funds Target Rate at the first most recent change was... (ver_3cf205b6c2324025b0029a6fec3eb539)

messages.content: Reports that the Federal Funds Target Rate at the first most recent change was 5.25% +/-0.05.

messages.content: Reports that the Federal Funds Target Rate at the second most recent change was 5.00% +/-0.05.

rubrics.name: Reports that the first most recent change to the Federal Funds target rate was... (ver_f569cb0fa0024dfdaaf4987c3cde828c)

messages.content: Reports that the first most recent change to the Federal Funds target rate was 13 months ago.

rubrics.name: Reports that the second most recent change to the Federal Funds target rate... (ver_52aa41ad11984e938eee37372f16e508)

messages.content: Reports that the second most recent change to the Federal Funds target rate was 16 months ago.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
The most recent change to the Fed Funds target rate was an increase of 0.25% to a target rate of 5.25%, which occurred 13 months ago.
The next most recent change to the Fed Funds target rate was an increase of 0.25% to a target rate of 5.00%, which occurred 16 months ago.

SQLite query result:
observation_date  ffr_target  ffr_change  ffr_change_months_ago
      2023-04-28        5.25        0.25                     13
      2023-02-03        5.00        0.25                     16

```SQLite
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    observation_date,
    DFEDTARL AS ffr_target,
    DFEDTARL - LAG(DFEDTARL) OVER (ORDER BY observation_date) AS ffr_change
  FROM fred_database
  ),
filtered AS (
  SELECT * FROM base
  WHERE ffr_change != 0
  AND observation_date <= DATE('2024-06-01')
  ORDER BY observation_date DESC
  LIMIT 2
  )
SELECT
  *,
  CAST(ROUND((JULIANDAY('2024-06-01') - JULIANDAY(observation_date))/30, 0) AS INTEGER) as ffr_change_months_ago
FROM filtered;
```
